content:
# Ultrasonic Image Analysis

**Summary**: Analysis of ultrasonic images to identify borehole breakouts and determine in-situ stress.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-saleh|Saleh, 2016]] used ultrasonic-image-analysis to identify breakout zones and determine the orientation of maximum horizontal stress.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Identified a N-S orientation for minimum horizontal principal stress and an E-W orientation for maximum horizontal principal stress. ([[2016-saleh|Saleh, 2016, p. 116]])
